title: Beyth #1033
definition:
Beth-car = "house of the ram" or "place of the lamb"

 1) a place apparently belonging to the Philistines
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beth-car = "house of the ram" or "place of the lamb"

 1) a place apparently belonging to the Philistines

    NASB:  place of a lamb, a place in Pal.
